title: Koby Breaks Through with Honesty Impact
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Kizaru, Unknown person #4, Bepo, Garp, Kuzan, Unknown person #5 as Garp and SWORD fight the Blackbeard Pirates on Hachinosu while Koby’s rescue becomes a turning point for the next generation of Marines.
scene: Garp and SWORD fight the Blackbeard Pirates on Hachinosu while Koby’s rescue becomes a turning point for the next generation of Marines.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and all the rescued slaves are on board.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We need to thaw the frozen people out slowly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You can pullout when you're ready!!

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: KOBY!! Grus!! Helmepo!! It's time to go!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hachinosu lives up to its reputation!! There's no end to all these pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Like I said, I can't just let you leave.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I should've gone with the others!! We're doomed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Garp-san, am I also *the future of the marines*?!

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: We can't underestimate the Titanic captains!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Head straight to the coast, and you'll be fine!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: DON'T DIE ON ME, YA HEAR?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: OH NO, THEY STILL HAVE A HOSTAGE!!

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: Koby, you idiot! It's a trap!!

summary: This part advances the Garp’s Last Stand at Hachinosu through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
